description_long: This object is a classic shotgun featuring a long, cylindrical barrel with a smooth, dark metallic finish and a wooden stock. The stock is robust and ergonomically shaped, with a rich brown color and visible wood grain, extending into a slightly curved shoulder rest. The receiver and trigger assembly are compact, with a metallic sheen and a visible trigger guard. The fore-end appears to be ribbed, suggesting a pump-action mechanism, and is also made of wood matching the stock. The barrel is uninterrupted and single, with a small bead sight at the muzzle end. Overall, the shotgun has a traditional, utilitarian design suitable for both sporting and defensive purposes.
description: A traditional pump-action shotgun with a long, dark metal barrel and a brown wooden stock and fore-end, featuring a classic, robust design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, highlighting the wooden stock, metallic receiver, and long barrel.
description_view_1: Front-facing view emphasizing the circular barrel opening and the width of the stock.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the shotgun's profile, including the wooden fore-end and the metallic action area.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the butt of the stock and the alignment of the barrel and receiver.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, no visible ribbing or venting, standard barrel length
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a smooth contour and no visible finger grooves or reinforcement
